final:
module counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 3'b000;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
